sentences.text: This extension provides the minimal set of instructions needed to enable vector support of the BF16 format.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions

sentences.text: It enables BF16 as an interchange format as it provides conversion between BF16 values and FP32 values.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions

sentences.text: This extension depends upon `Zve32f` vector extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Vector convert FP32 to BF16
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: vfncvtbf16.f.f.w vd, vs2, vm
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Encoding:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: '1010111', attr:['OP-V']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vd'}, {bits: 3, name: '001', attr:['OPFVV']}, {bits: 5, name: '11101', attr:['vfncvtbf16']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vs2'}, {bits: 1, name: 'vm'}, {bits: 6, name: '010010', attr:['VFUNARY0']}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Reserved Encodings:: * `SEW` is any value other than 16
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: | |Register |Direction |EEW |Definition
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: | Vs2 | input | 32 | FP32 Source | Vd | output | 16 | BF16 Result |
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Description:: Narrowing convert from FP32 to BF16.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Round according to the frm register.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: This instruction is similar to `vfncvt.f.f.w` which converts a floating-point value in a 2*SEW-width format into an SEW-width format.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: However, here the SEW-width format is limited to BF16.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Exceptions: Overflow, Underflow, Inexact, Invalid
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w

sentences.text: Synopsis:: Vector convert BF16 to FP32
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: Mnemonic:: vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v vd, vs2, vm
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: Encoding:: [wavedrom, , svg] .... {reg:[ {bits: 7, name: '1010111', attr:['OP-V']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vd'}, {bits: 3, name: '001', attr:['OPFVV']}, {bits: 5, name: '01101', attr:['vfwcvtbf16']}, {bits: 5, name: 'vs2'}, {bits: 1, name: 'vm'}, {bits: 6, name: '010010', attr:['VFUNARY0']}, ]} ....
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: Reserved Encodings:: * `SEW` is any value other than 16
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: Arguments:: | |Register |Direction |EEW |Definition
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: | Vs2 | input | 16 | BF16 Source | Vd | output | 32 | FP32 Result |
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: Description:: Widening convert from BF16 to FP32.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: This instruction is similar to `vfwcvt.f.f.v` which converts a floating-point value in an SEW-width format into a 2*SEW-width format.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v

sentences.text: However, here the SEW-width format is limited to BF16.
sentences.section: Preamble > `Zvfbfmin` Extension for Vector BF16 Conversions > vfncvtbf16.f.f.w > vfwcvtbf16.f.f.v
